text.title: typescript-strict-mode Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to produce a per-flag migration plan.

step.name: baseline-errors
step.action: Count errors per category. Capture current_flags state.

step.name: plan-strict
step.action: Emit migration_step 1: enable strict. fix_strategy describes adding `| undefined` to optional returns and parameters.

step.name: plan-no-unchecked-indexed-access
step.action: Emit migration_step 2: enable noUncheckedIndexedAccess. fix_strategy: destructure-with-default at iteration sites; optional chain at single reads.

step.name: plan-exact-optional
step.action: Emit migration_step 3: enable exactOptionalPropertyTypes. fix_strategy: audit optional fields; add `| undefined` to ones intentionally assignable to undefined.

step.name: declare-lint-backstops
step.action: Add ESLint rules to prevent regression: @typescript-eslint/no-non-null-assertion, no-explicit-any, no-unsafe-assignment, ban-ts-comment.
step.decision-gate: Reject if neither no-non-null-assertion nor no-explicit-any is in lint_backstops.
